LAW AND MOTION, 302, RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT MARIA O'TOOLE, AS TRUSTEE OF THE FRANCES BEGLEY CHUA REVOCABLE TRUST'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS IS DENIED. WHETHER THE ORAL LIFE ESTATE WAS AN AMENDMENT TO THE TRUST AND WHETHER THE LIFE ESTATE IS VALID ARE FACTUAL ISSUES IMPROPERLY DETERMINED ON A MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS. MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-19-2012 Vacated

MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT MARIA O'TOOLE'S Motion To Compel Further Responses To Defendants Form Interrogatories is Off calendar. A dismissal was filed on October 12, 2012. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not Reported.

Ntc Of Motion For Leave To File An Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Oct-15-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: GENER BENITEZ, ESQ., IBARRA PROFESSIONAL LAW CORPORATION, 415.398.5329, FOR DEFENDANT MARIA OTOOLE; No other appearances.

RULING: THE COURT VACATES ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF TERESA CHUA'S Motion For Leave To File An Amended Complain IS OFF CALENDAR. A REQUEST FOR DISMISSAL WAS FILED ON OCTOBER 12, 2012. Judge: Harold Kahn Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Apr-18-2012 Set For Trial On Nov-05-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS
Off Calendar Oct-05-2012 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - TERESA E. CHUA, TEL. NO. 676-0478, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT MARIA O'TOOLE, AS TRUSTEE OF THE FRANCES BEGLEY CHUA REVOCABLE TRUST'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS is Denied. Whether the oral life estate was an amendment to the trust and whether the life estate is valid are factual issues improperly determined on a motion for judgment on the pleadings. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Not reported. =302/HK
